sections.title: Live projects
sections.subtitle: Things that are running right now and you can use today

items.name: feaws
items.summary: An asset-agnostic quant trading model. BTC first, but the same engine applies to stocks, commodities, forex. The whitepaper is open. The trades are public.

highlights.v: BTC dip over the next couple of months
Python · Polymarket API · GDELT · sentiment + F&G · Postgres · Next.js
the content IS the product · the trading IS the proof

items.name: Dailyvox
items.summary: A free voice journal that builds your Digital Twin without ever leaving your iPhone. No accounts, no cloud, no tracking. Voice-to-LLM, all local. Also where I'm experimenting with running a real LLM on a home machine — closing in.

sections.title: Books
sections.subtitle: Published with Packt, 2018. Code repos still maintained.

items.name: Mobile Artificial Intelligence Projects
items.summary: Project-driven guide for shipping ML on iOS and Android. Age + gender CNN, neural style transfer, ML Kit (text/face/barcode), Snapchat-style face filters with OpenCV, MNIST adversarial classifier, on-device food classification via transfer learning.

highlights.v: TF Lite · Core ML · Caffe2 · ML Kit · OpenCV · transfer learning

items.name: Machine Learning for Mobile Applications
items.tagline: Concept-first companion to Mobile AI Projects
items.summary: The mental-model book. Demystifies the mobile ML landscape — toolchains, deployment patterns, on-device vs cloud tradeoffs, what to use when. Pairs cleanly with the projects book if you want both the why and the how.

highlights.v: Light on code, heavy on architecture decisions
The mental model held up better than the specific tool versions did

sections.title: Past work
sections.subtitle: Older builds — Teleport Call (GazeMatic) is the one that hit hardest.

items.name: Teleport Call
items.summary: Founded GazeMatic in 2014. Built Teleport Call — a first-of-its-kind VR voice-calling app where two callers could meet inside a shared virtual environment. 420k+ organic downloads in the first month, 1.2M+ calls placed across US/UK/Germany/Russia/India. Zero paid marketing. Ran for 4 years before winding down.

highlights.v: live streaming · adaptive video compression · multi-node CDN · real-time 3D
